results.empty: Run a simulation to see impact results.

crater.title: Crater zone
crater.desc: The initial impact excavates a crater around ground zero.

fireball.title: Fireball zone
fireball.desc: Thermal radiation can ignite exposed materials and cause severe burns near the impact.

disclaimer.torino: Risk tiers are educational approximations, not official Torino Scale ratings.

t0.title: Contact and energy release
t0.desc: The asteroid reaches the surface or airburst point and releases kinetic energy almost instantly.

t10s.title: Fireball expansion
t10s.desc: The fireball and initial blast front expand outward from the impact point.

t1m.title: Blast wave arrives
t1m.desc: Overpressure reaches nearby areas, damaging windows and vulnerable structures.

t10m.title: Seismic shaking spreads
t10m.desc: Ground shaking and ejecta effects propagate across the broader region.

t1h.title: Regional aftermath
t1h.desc: Dust, fires, and infrastructure disruption dominate the first hour after impact.

energyVsDiameter.title: Energy versus diameter
energyVsDiameter.desc: Logarithmic curve showing impact energy growth as asteroid diameter increases.
energyVsDiameter.ariaLabel: Energy versus diameter chart. Current diameter {diameter} meters with energy {energy} joules.

energyVsVelocity.title: Energy versus velocity
energyVsVelocity.desc: Chart showing kinetic energy growth as impact velocity increases.
energyVsVelocity.ariaLabel: Energy versus velocity chart. Current velocity {velocity} kilometers per second with energy {energy} joules.

damage.tableCaption: Damage zones and their estimated radii from the impact point

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.desc: Region engulfed by the initial fireball.

thermalSevere.name: Severe thermal
thermalSevere.desc: Thermal radiation likely to ignite clothing.

thermalModerate.name: Moderate thermal
thermalModerate.desc: Thermal radiation capable of third-degree burns.

blastSevere.name: Severe blast
blastSevere.desc: Overpressure high enough for lethal structural damage.

blastModerate.name: Moderate blast
blastModerate.desc: Overpressure likely to collapse weaker buildings.

seismic.name: Seismic shaking
seismic.desc: Radius where ground shaking may be felt.
